character.name: Jorren
character.appearance: Middle-aged man with shrewd, intelligent features, close-cropped hair, and a calm, authoritative demeanor. Dresses in impeccably tailored but sober grey wool.
character.personality: Calculating, professional, and shrewd. Values efficiency and profit above all, with a keen eye for opportunity and risk. Maintains composure but shows awe and avarice when presented with revolutionary magic.
character.job: Factor Third Class at the Veridis Merchant Bank and Exchange, a Charterhouse of the Sovereign League in Port Veridis.

character.name: Vance
character.appearance: Middle-aged woman with sharp, intelligent features, hair in a severe bun, and pale, calculating grey eyes. Wears dark robes of a senior administrator.
character.personality: Cold, analytical, and authoritative. Acts as a strategic enforcer for the academy, using manipulation and threats to maintain control. Shows frustration and awe when confronted with unexpected power.
character.job: Undersecretary of the Office of Internal Review at Sunspire Academy, responsible for internal security and anomaly management.
